name: Static Image Extension
author: Your Name
description: A simple extension that displays a static image on the side of the screen

settings.label: Image Path
settings.description: Path to the static image to display

settings.label: Position
settings.description: Which side of the screen to display the image

settings.label: Panel Width (px)
settings.description: Width of the image panel in pixels

settings.label: Show Close Button
settings.description: Whether to show a close button on the panel
